heading: Total area; consent of Congress to acquisition of lands and property and transfer thereof to United States
label: 262 Total area; consent of Congress to acquisition of lands and property and transfer thereof to United States
notes: Amendments1943—Act , among other changes, inserted minimum acreage limitation in first par. and added pars. (a) and (b).May 26, 1943
amendments: Amendments1943—Act , among other changes, inserted minimum acreage limitation in first par. and added pars. (a) and (b).May 26, 1943

children.label: a
children.text: The consent of Congress is given to the States of Tennessee, Kentucky, and Virginia to enter into a compact providing for (1) the acquisition of the lands, structures, and other property in the Cumberland Gap-Cumberland Ford areas referred to in , and (2) the transfer of title to such lands, structures, and other property to the United States.section 261 of this title

children.label: b
children.text: The right to alter, amend, or repeal this section is expressly reserved.
